form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 2nd over 365m at Nowra beaten 6 lengths (21.37) behind Angry Friendship in a Grade 5 on April 2. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th over 318m at Dubbo beaten 5 lengths (19.09) behind Lunar Blast in a Grade 5 on March 16. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Beautiful Magpie beaten 6 lengths (19.85). Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Beautiful Magpie beaten 6 lengths (19.85). Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was tightened for room in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has struggled to find form of late. Last raced when sixth over 401m at Richmond five months ago. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has struggled to find form of late. Last raced when sixth over 401m at Richmond five months ago. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished seventh over 350m at this track, beaten 18 lengths. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished seventh over 350m at this track, beaten 18 lengths. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn inconvenienced and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 6 for the first time after finishing a 8 length fourth at Richmond (19.10) in a Grade 5. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 6 for the first time after finishing a 8 length fourth at Richmond (19.10) in a Grade 5. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the turn out of the back straight hampered off the heels.

form.formComment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished 7th on March 13 over 350m at this track behind Gus And Dodo beaten 8 lengths (20.53) in a Grade 5. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 365m at Nowra, beaten 5.5 lengths (21.21) behind Baby Time in a Grade 5 on March 30. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 365m at Nowra beaten 12 lengths (21.79) behind Angry Friendship in a Grade 5 on April 2. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
